title: Server Booster
description: Stop the lag and stabilize your TPS with ServerBooster—a premium suite of high-performance tools designed to handle 100+ player survival networks with ease
body:
# ⚡ ServerBooster **Free Server Performance Plugin for PaperMC, Spigot & Purpur** Lag killing your server? Fix it in 30 seconds.\ Drop in the JAR. No config needed. Just works.
--- ## What Does It Do? ServerBooster finds what's lagging your server and fixes it automatically.\ Mobs, hoppers, redstone, chunks — it handles everything. --- ## ✅ Features ### ⚡ Works Everywhere - One JAR for **PaperMC, Spigot, Purpur**, and all forks - Auto-detects your platform and picks the best optimizations - No extra dependencies required — just drop and go ### 🎮 Beautiful In-Game Dashboard - Live **TPS sparkline**, memory gauge, and server stats - Toggle any module **on/off** with one click - Per-world entity counts and loaded chunks - Alert history — see what optimizations are running ### 🐄 Smart Entity Management - Per-entity-type limits with radius and chunk caps - **AI freezing** for mobs in inactive areas — they stop thinking, you stop lagging - Aggressive despawning cleans up excess mobs - Breeding and growth rate throttling to prevent animal farm lag ### ⚙️ Hopper & Redstone Optimizer - **Sleeping hoppers** — if they're not moving items, they stop ticking - **Redstone clock detection** — auto-throttles lag machines - **Observer loop detection** — stops infinite loops without breaking farms - **Dust deduplication** — reduces same-tick wire updates ### 📊 Dynamic View Distance - View distance scales down when TPS drops, scales back up when it recovers - Idle players get reduced distance automatically - Your active players always get the best experience ### 📦 Item Stacking - Ground items merge together instead of piling up - Hologram labels and glow effects so players can see what's stacked - Fewer entities on the ground = better performance
🔧 Even More Optimizations - **Chunk Packet Throttling** — Controls how fast chunk data goes to players - **Portal & Piston Budgets** — Prevents lag machines - **Elytra & Trident Speed Caps** — Stops fast travel from overloading chunks - **Crop Growth Throttling** — Reduces farm tick overhead in empty chunks - **Furnace & Dropper Sleep** — Idle machines stop ticking - **Faster Leaf Decay** — Cleans up floating leaves fast - **Auto Garbage Collection** — Smart JVM memory management - **Console Filter** — Hides spammy log messages - **Spawner Throttling** — Reduces spawner load during lag - **TPS-Based Commands** — Auto-run commands when TPS drops
--- ## 🛠️ Commands | Command | Alias | Description | Permission | |---|:---:|---|---| | `/serverbooster` | `/sb` | Open the dashboard | `serverbooster.admin` | | `/sb reload` | — | Reload configuration | `serverbooster.reload` | | `/sb mobs count` | — | Count nearby entities | `serverbooster.mobs.count` | | `/sb mobs check` | — | Inspect mob you're looking at | `serverbooster.mobs.check` | | `/sb mobs forceoptimize` | — | Force-run entity optimizer | `serverbooster.mobs.forceoptimize` | | `/sb emergency` | — | Toggle emergency mode | `serverbooster.admin` | | `/sb alerts` | — | View recent alerts | `serverbooster.admin` | | `/sb benchmark` | — | Run 30s performance test | `serverbooster.admin` | --- ## 📥 Installation 1. Download **ServerBooster-Free.jar** 2. Drop it into your `/plugins` folder 3. Restart your server 4. Type `/sb` to open the dashboard — done! 5. Fine-tune anything in `plugins/ServerBooster/config.yml` --- ## 📋 Requirements - **Minecraft:** 1.21+ - **Java:** 21+ - **Server:** PaperMC, Spigot, Purpur, or any compatible fork - **Optional:** ProtocolLib (for packet optimizations), PlaceholderAPI ---
## 🔥 Want Even More Performance? Upgrade to **[ServerBooster Premium](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/serverbooster-premium.134480/)** and unlock: 🧨 **Smart Explosion Engine** — TNT & creeper farms won't lag anymore\ 🧠 **Advanced Villager AI** — Stops villager lag completely\ 📡 **Packet Metadata Filtering** — Smooth gameplay even under pressure **[→ Get Premium Here ←](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/serverbooster-premium.134480/)**
---
